data.title: Diamond Princess introduces new dining experiences for 2026 Japan season with Makoto Ocean and Crown Grill. A 115,875-ton ship hosting 2,670 guests will feature these additions.
data.description: Princess Cruises' Diamond Princess, with a capacity of 2,670 guests and weighing 115,875 tons, introduced two new dining options for the 2026 Japan season. The ship now features Makoto Ocean and Crown Grill, a guest-favorite venue.

data.title: Packaging Corp of America (NYSE: PKG) is expected to report an EPS of $2.41. Investors await quarterly earnings announcement for prospects. Share price is $225.39, down 5.86% over 52 weeks. Analysts provide insights on market expectations.
data.description: Packaging Corp of America (NYSE: PKG) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Tuesday, 2026-01-27. Analysts predict an EPS of $2.41 for the company. Investors are keenly awaiting the announcement and hoping for results surpassing estimates, as well as positive guidance for the next quarter. The company missed EPS by $0.09 last quarter but saw a 2.17% share price increase the following day. The stock was trading at $225.39 as of January 23, with shares down 5.86% in the past 52 weeks. Analysts emphasize the importance of understanding market sentiments and expectations in the industry, advising investors to consider these factors.

data.title: Job Corps was facing closure due to a $39 million budget cut, but has been saved.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. The number of new jobs created in the last month reached a total of 250,000, surpassing all previous records. Additionally, the stock market experienced a notable surge, with the main index rising by 5% in the last week. Overall, these indicators point towards a strong and growing economy, bringing positive implications for the country's financial outlook.

data.title: US official says no immediate retaliation over Canada-China partnership; threat may resurface during USMCA talks.
data.description: A high-ranking official in the administration hinted that Canada's recent collaboration with China may not lead to immediate reprisals. However, this issue could resurface during discussions related to the USMCA.

data.title: NVIDIA's Earth-2 model enhances climate resolution by 11x. It uncovers hidden storms in data, tested by S & P Global.
data.description: NVIDIA has introduced its Earth-2 platform which can reduce rough climate projections to uncover previously undetectable hurricanes and typhoons. This technology is being tested by S&P Global for risk analytics.

data.title: Polygon aims for $0.45-$0.52 rebound by March 2026, potentially 18-37% upside from oversold $0.38 support. Technicals mixed.
data.description: Analysts forecasting for MATIC coin anticipate a potential increase of 18-37% in value, reaching a range between $0.45 and $0.52 in the next 4-6 weeks. Currently, Polygon is being traded oversold at the support level of $0.38, indicating a buying opportunity. However, technical indicators present a mixed outlook for the future performance of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Steel Dynamics, Inc. hits 52-week high with record steel shipments. Q4 net sales at $4.414B, net income $266M, EPS $1.82. EBITDA $505.4M. Flat-rolled steel down 140,000-150,000 tons due to maintenance. Aluminum operations suffered $47M loss.
data.description: Steel Dynamics, Inc. (NASDAQ: STLD) saw its stock rise after reporting fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results. The company's fourth-quarter net sales were $4.414 billion, with net income at $266 million, or $1.82 per diluted share. This was an increase from the prior year's $207 million in net income. The company's revenue missed analyst estimates by $161 million, and its diluted EPS fell short by $0.13. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $505.4 million, and operating income for steel operations was $322 million, steel fabrication was $91 million, and metals recycling was $19 million. However, aluminum operations recorded an operating loss of $47 million. Steel Dynamics cited planned maintenance outages that reduced flat-rolled steel production by 140,000 to 150,000 tons in the quarter. The average external steel selling price during the quarter was $1,107 per ton.

data.title: Moyom Biotechnology partners with WPP Group to boost "Poetics of Time" brand; collaboration enhances brand positioning.
data.description: Moyom Biotechnology has disclosed a new strategic collaboration with WPP Group to enhance the brand positioning of Aphranel's "Poetics of Time." The partnership was announced on January 26, 2026 by SHANGHAI MOYOM BIOTECHNOLOGY CO., LTD through a press release on PR Newswire. This collaboration aims to leverage WPP Group's expertise to elevate Aphranel's brand positioning in the market.

data.title: DOGE price may hit $0.13-$0.15 by February with current price at $0.12 and RSI at 38.80. Technical analysis favors a bounce.
data.description: The price of Dogecoin is currently valued at $0.12, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 38.80, indicating a potential bounce due to being oversold. Technical analysis forecasts that Dogecoin could reach a resistance zone between $0.13 and $0.15.
